known_values.description: Ignite the night with PARTY TIME 's where every second bursts with brilliance!Get ready to elevate your celebrations with SUNS FIREWORKS' extraordinary PARTY TIME 200 Gram Cake! This spectacular firework is designed to dazzle and delight, transforming any occasion into a magical experience. Watch in awe as brocade crown tails burst into vibrant red palms and green strobes, painting the night sky with a symphony of colors for a full 20 seconds.
